package rulecoverage

func PositiveInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicated() string {
    ruleID := "inline_error_to_status_mapping_duplicated"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated error-to-status translation switches across handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
